title: Are board ids and board view ids unique across accounts?
excerpt:
This is a question to the monday team - and can I have the same id for board and board view or are they guaranteed to be different? 
Thanks, 
Ronen

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a question to the monday team - and can I have the same id for board and board view or are they guaranteed to be different?

Thanks,
Ronen

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rbabayoff,

From what I have found, they are unique across the whole platform.

You can assume that no board or view will have the same ID

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff

Just wanted to piggyback on what the great @mitchell.hudson had to say on this, and I can confirm that Item, Board, User and View IDs are unique across the platform

-Alex
